VAL-AUTH-001.evidence: User registered successfully, user created in database with argon2id hash

VAL-AUTH-004.evidence: Protected route /api/auth/me returned 401 without token, 200 with valid token

VAL-AUTH-005.evidence: Database query confirmed password_hash contains argon2id hash, not plain text

VAL-AUTH-006.blockingReason: Flet app cannot launch due to AttributeError: module 'flet' has no attribute 'icons'. Code uses ft.icons.X but Flet 0.28.3 uses ft.Icons.X (capital I). App crashes before lock screen can display.

VAL-UI-001.blockingReason: Flet app cannot launch due to AttributeError: module 'flet' has no attribute 'icons'. Code uses ft.icons.X but Flet 0.28.3 uses ft.Icons.X (capital I). App crashes on startup.

VAL-UI-002.blockingReason: Flet app cannot launch due to AttributeError: module 'flet' has no attribute 'icons'. Code uses ft.icons.X but Flet 0.28.3 uses ft.Icons.X (capital I). Navigation cannot be tested.

VAL-AI-001.evidence: Network monitoring confirmed 0 external calls. All LLM inference uses local llama-cpp-python or MockLLMService.

VAL-AI-002.evidence: RAM detection correctly identifies 64GB RAM and suggests Qwen2.5-14B model (min 16GB).

VAL-AI-003.evidence: Model selection via POST /api/models/active works. Selected model persists in settings.

VAL-AI-004.evidence: Streaming endpoint returns SSE with 23 incremental token events. Format verified: data: prefix, final complete event.

VAL-AI-005.evidence: PersonaService builds Marcus Aurelius system prompt. AI responses maintain stoic philosopher character.

VAL-AI-006.evidence: MARCUS_BASE_PROMPT references Amor Fati, Memento Mori, Dichotomy of Control, Virtue. AI responses apply these principles.

VAL-AI-007.evidence: Network monitoring confirmed zero telemetry/analytics calls. All network activity is localhost only.

VAL-MODEL-001.evidence: RAM detected, model recommendations returned via /api/settings/system. Model selection works.

VAL-MODEL-002.evidence: Model switching via POST /api/models/active successful. Previous model deactivated, new model activated.
